rankings.title: Decarceration Without Danger? Progressive Prosecutors, Jail Populations, and Homicide Mortality
conditions: a pre-registered “COVID/post-2020 shock” strategy such as cohort restrictions or interacted shocks
explicit coding/controls for statewide bail or sentencing reforms
a leave-one-large-county-out influence analysis

rankings.title: Racial Convergence or Divergence? Progressive Prosecutors and the Black-White Incarceration Gap
conditions: a transparent suppression/measurement plan
focusing on a pre-specified “large-county” analysis with power
pairing with Idea 1’s first-stage to show actual detention changes by race

rankings.title: The Charge Channel — How Progressive Prosecutors Reshape Deterrence Signals
The Geography of Justice — Spatial Spillovers from Progressive Prosecution
conditions: a design that demonstrably achieves parallel pre-trends—otherwise it will be hard to publish as causal

rankings.title: Progressive Prosecutors and Local Economic Activity
Idea 4: Racial Convergence or Divergence? Progressive Prosecutors and the Black-White Incarceration Gap
conditions: verifying sufficient race-specific homicide counts in the pre-period for the treated counties to ensure statistical power
